Name the sets whose members consist of all and
only those items in the shaded regions of the following Venn diagrams:

(a).

![](/content/static/images/venn-1.png){width=350 fig-align="center"}

(b).

![](/content/static/images/venn-2.png){width=350 fig-align="center"}

(c).

![](/content/static/images/venn-3.png){width=350 fig-align="center"}
